generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families from foreign threats. While some politicians talk about 'global cooperation', we've seen how quickly allies can abandon us when it's convenient. Remember 2022? Remember the empty promises? Our military needs to be ready to stand alone when necessary. That's why I support real strategic autonomy - not just for national pride, but for our security. #NationalSecurityFirst
